title: Creamy Italian Tiramisu
description: A classic Italian dessert made with ladyfingers soaked in coffee and liqueur, layered with creamy mascarpone cheese and topped with cocoa powder. This creamy version uses burrata cheese for a rich and decadent treat.
instructions: Dip each ladyfinger into the coffee for about 3-5 seconds on each side. They should be soft and pliable but not too wet.
In a large bowl, combine the mascarpone cheese, egg yolks, granulated sugar, and vanilla extract. Mix well until smooth.
Add the burrata cheese to the mascarpone mixture and mix until well combined.
To assemble the tiramisù, start with a layer of ladyfingers in the bottom of a large serving dish.
Spread half of the mascarpone mixture over the ladyfingers.
Repeat the layers, starting with the ladyfingers, then the mascarpone mixture, and finally another layer of ladyfingers.
Cover the dish with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 3 hours or overnight.
Just before serving, sprinkle the top of the tiramisù with cocoa powder.
Slice the tiramisù into individual servings and serve chilled.
